#
# Rule: database_dsn
# Category: technology
# Jurisdiction: global
#
# Parses the Go MySQL DSN form `user:password@protocol(addr)/db` and
# redacts userinfo; preserves protocol, address, database and params.
# Example: user:password@tcp(localhost:3306)/dbname →
# ****:****@tcp(localhost:3306)/dbname.
